overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a solitary walk through a rain-drenched neon-lit urban district at night. The character progresses from a ground-level commercial promenade past the 'Brooklyn Barista' cafe, ascends to an elevated walkway lined with palm trees and holographic billboards, then descends into a parking area, with heavy rainfall creating reflective wet surfaces throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground-level commercial promenade with outdoor cafe seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pavement past neon-lit storefronts and outdoor seating areas

entered.detail: large red neon sign for Brooklyn Barista cafe with glowing letters
white canopy umbrellas over outdoor cafe tables and chairs
rain-soaked reflective pavement showing neon reflections
tall modern street lamps illuminating the walkway
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked commercial street at night, with the Brooklyn Barista neon sign glowing prominently on the left. The camera moves forward past outdoor cafe seating with white umbrellas, while digital billboards illuminate the distance. Heavy rainfall creates reflective wet surfaces throughout the empty pedestrian promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with neon advertisements and palm trees

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs to elevated walkway level

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs to an elevated walkway while rain continues to fall heavily

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading upward to the elevated level
silver metal safety railings along the stairs and walkway edge
large pink and purple neon sign reading CIRCUS on building facade
tall palm trees lining the elevated walkway
raised concrete pedestrian path with metal railings

segments.scene_description: The character ascends concrete stairs to an elevated walkway, leaving the ground-level cafes behind. At the top, the view opens to reveal the glowing Circus neon sign and palm trees lining the walkway, with digital billboards now visible to the left. The heavy rain continues unabated on this exposed elevated level.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor parking area with parked vehicles

events.description: begins descending stairs from elevated walkway to parking level
enters parking area with parked cars visible on the left

agents.ego_description: descending stairs into a lower parking area while passing parked vehicles

entered.detail: concrete stairs leading downward to the parking level
row of parked vehicles including a blue car in the rain
open parking space with marked lines and wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the elevated walkway into a dimly lit parking area, transitioning from the neon-lit commercial zone to a more utilitarian space. Parked cars line the left side of the wet concrete path as the camera continues forward through the rain, with street lamps providing the primary illumination in this lower level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-drenched urban district that transitions from a vibrant commercial promenade to a utilitarian parking area. It begins on a rain-soaked street, moving past the glowing neon sign of the Brooklyn Barista and outdoor cafe seating under white umbrellas. As the camera ascends a set of concrete stairs, the scene opens onto an elevated walkway where palm trees and a bright Circus neon sign emerge through the heavy rainfall. The perspective then shifts downward, descending from the neon-lit heights into a dimly lit parking zone. Finally, the environment transforms into a more industrial space, moving past parked cars along a wet concrete path illuminated by solitary street lamps.
